howItWorks.intro: This hull speed calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Hull Speed
rules.explanation: Speed in knots equals 1.34 times square root of waterline length in feet.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.a: The maximum efficient speed for a displacement hull, limited by its own wave.

faq.q: Can a boat go faster than hull speed?
faq.a: Planing hulls can exceed it by rising on top of the water. Displacement hulls cannot easily.
